title: What Is This Dimension
description: this mod add a strange dimension
body:
This mod adds a strange dimension with a creepy atmosphere and unsettling elements

how create the portal :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

first step you need the portal igniter ![portal]
![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/230efc21c0787ca6efcb707286f7882fd0b8ca7c.png)
second step you need some coal block to create the portal like this :
![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/463683a00e93565aa91918e833073f9c93e5e89b.png)
the last step is click on a coal block with the I_G_N_I_T_E_R


</details>
